visualizations.title: Rounding Deciding Digit Rule
visualizations.description: The logic flow of rounding based on the neighbor digit.

steps.explanation: If the digit to the right is 5, 6, 7, 8, or 9: add 1 to the target place value.
If the digit to the right is 0, 1, 2, 3, or 4: keep the target place value unchanged.

visualizations.title: Rounding 4.37 on a Number Line
visualizations.description: See why 4.37 rounds up to 4.4 by seeing which boundary it sits closest to.
